info.name: Insurance Incentive Management System
info.description:
Complete API collection for the Insurance Incentive Management System.

**Setup:**
1. Run "Get System Token" first to authenticate integration endpoints
2. Collection variables are auto-populated by test scripts
3. Use the suggested folder order for a clean test flow

See POSTMAN_GUIDE.md for detailed instructions.

item.name: 01 - Authentication
item.description: Obtain JWT tokens for user and system authentication.

request.description: Authenticate as a system client and receive a JWT. The token is automatically saved to the `system_token` collection variable.

Login with user credentials. Token is automatically saved to the `user_token` collection variable.

> **Note**: User auth is currently a pass-through placeholder. This endpoint is planned for future implementation.
Refresh an expiring user token. Planned for future implementation.

item.name: 02 - Programs & Groups
item.description: Manage incentive programs and user groups.

request.description: Retrieve all incentive programs.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Q1 2026 Sales Incentive",
  "description": "Quarterly incentive program for life insurance agents",
  "start_date": "2026-01-01",
  "end_date": "2026-03-31",
  "is_active": true
}

request.description: Create a new incentive program. The returned `id` is saved to `program_id`.
Get details of a specific program.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Q1 2026 Sales Incentive (Updated)",
  "description": "Updated quarterly incentive for life insurance agents",
  "start_date": "2026-01-01",
  "end_date": "2026-03-31",
  "is_active": true
}

request.description: Update an existing program.
Toggle the active/inactive status of a program.
Delete a program. Use with caution — may fail if KPIs or payouts reference it.
List user groups, optionally filtered by program.
Create a new user group.
Add a member to a group.
List all members in a group.

item.name: 03 - KPI Configuration
item.description: Define KPI rules and milestone thresholds for incentive programs.

request.description: List all KPI definitions, optionally filtered by program.
Create a new KPI definition for a program.
Update an existing KPI definition.
Delete a KPI definition. Will fail if milestones exist.
Add a milestone tier to a KPI (e.g. Bronze/Silver/Gold/Platinum).
Update an existing milestone.
Delete a milestone from a KPI.

item.name: 04 - Payout Rules
item.description: Configure payout rules, commission slabs, and qualifying criteria.

request.description: List payout rules for a program.
Create a new payout rule. `payout_type`: COMMISSION | BONUS | OVERRIDE. `calc_method`: FLAT | MULTIPLY | PERCENTAGE_OF.
Update an existing payout rule.
Add a tiered commission slab to a payout rule.
Update an existing payout slab.
Delete a payout slab.
Add a qualifying gate to a payout rule (e.g. minimum persistency threshold).

item.name: 05 - Data Upload
item.description: Bulk upload CSV files for policies, agents, persistency, products, and rates.

formdata.description: CSV with columns: policy_number, agent_code, product_code, transaction_type, premium_amount, annualized_premium, paid_date

request.description:
Upload policy transaction data via CSV.

**Required columns:** policy_number, agent_code, product_code, transaction_type, premium_amount, annualized_premium, paid_date

**Optional columns:** channel_code, region_code, policy_year, sum_assured, payment_mode, issue_date, due_date, policy_status

formdata.description: CSV with columns: agent_code, agent_name, channel_code, region_code, hierarchy_level

request.description:
Upload agent master data via CSV.

**Required columns:** agent_code, agent_name, channel_code, region_code, hierarchy_level

formdata.description: CSV with columns: agent_code, persistency_month, period_start, period_end, policies_due, policies_renewed

request.description:
Upload persistency data via CSV.

**Required columns:** agent_code, persistency_month, period_start, period_end, policies_due, policies_renewed
Upload product master data via CSV.
Upload incentive rate schedules via CSV.

formdata.description: CSV with MLM hierarchy override rate schedule

request.description: Upload MLM/hierarchy override rate schedules via CSV.

item.name: 06 - Calculations
item.description: Run incentive calculations and check job status.

request.description: Run bulk incentive calculation for all active agents in a program period.
Check the status of a calculation job.
Recompute incentive for a single agent.

item.name: 07 - Incentive Results & Approval
item.description: View, approve, and manage incentive result payouts.

request.description: List incentive results with optional filters: programId, periodStart, channel, region, status.
Get detailed incentive result for a single record.
Approve a single incentive result (DRAFT → APPROVED).
Bulk approve all DRAFT results for a program/period. Only results passing the persistency gate are approved.
Move APPROVED results to INITIATED and log the payment reference.
Mark INITIATED results as PAID.
Get channel-level summary of incentive results.
Get pipeline stage counts (DRAFT / APPROVED / INITIATED / PAID) with totals.

item.name: 08 - Leaderboard & Dashboard
item.description: Analytics, leaderboard rankings, and executive dashboard.

request.description: Get ranked agent leaderboard. Optional filters: channel, region.
Executive dashboard with KPI cards, channel breakdown, product mix, top agents, pipeline status, and recent activity.

item.name: 09 - Integration Inbound
item.description: Inbound API endpoints for Penta system integration (system-to-system auth).

request.description: Push a single policy transaction from Penta. Requires system token.
Push a batch of policy transactions from Penta. Staged in `stg_policy_transactions` for validation.
Notify the system of an agent status change from Penta.
Check Penta integration heartbeat and last sync timestamp.

item.name: 10 - Integration Outbound
item.description: Export incentive data to SAP FICO and Oracle Financials.

request.description: Generate SAP FICO export file for approved incentive results.
Generate Oracle AP CSV export for approved incentive results. Response is a CSV file download.
View history of generated export files from `outbound_file_log`.

item.name: 11 - Integration Monitoring
item.description: Monitor integration health, view logs, and trigger manual jobs.

request.description: Dashboard status showing health of all integration channels (Life Asia SFTP, Penta API, Hierarchy API, Outbound exports).
View file processing log entries (SFTP imports, uploads).
View API call audit log entries.
View staging records in INVALID or ERROR status. Filterable by table: stg_policy_transactions, stg_agent_master.
Manually trigger SFTP poll for Life Asia file imports. Runs asynchronously.
Manually trigger agent hierarchy sync from master data API.
Reset all INVALID/ERROR staging records to PENDING for reprocessing.

item.name: 12 - Review Adjustments
item.description: Review, adjust, hold and approve incentive calculation results before payout.

request.description: List incentive results available for review. Supports filtering by program and period with pagination.
Retrieve full detail of a single review adjustment record including current status and history.
Apply a manual monetary adjustment to an incentive result. Requires reason and authoriser.
Place an incentive result on hold pending further review or compliance check.
Release a previously held incentive result so it can proceed to approval.
Approve multiple incentive results in a single operation.
Retrieve the full audit trail for a review adjustment record showing all state changes.

item.name: 13 - Exception Log
item.description: View and resolve exceptions raised during incentive calculation or data processing.

request.description: List exception log entries. Filter by status and severity with pagination support.
Get full detail of a single exception including stack trace and context data.
Mark an exception as resolved with resolution details and operator note.

item.name: 14 - Executive Summary
item.description: High-level executive dashboard summaries for incentive programme performance.

request.description: Retrieve executive-level summary metrics including total payouts, participation rates and programme KPIs.

item.name: 15 - System Status
item.description: Monitor overall system health, service availability and background job status.

request.description: Get aggregated system status summary including database connectivity, queue health and service uptime.

item.name: 16 - Notifications
item.description: Manage in-app notifications for the current user.

request.description: List notifications for the authenticated user. Optionally filter to unread only.
Mark a single notification as read.
Mark all unread notifications as read for the authenticated user.

item.name: 17 - Org & Domain Mapping
item.description: Organisation hierarchy and domain mapping lookups for reporting and access control.

request.description: Retrieve organisational domain mapping tree. Supports view modes: region, branch, channel.

item.name: 18 - KPI Config Helpers
item.description: Utility endpoints for KPI configuration management, validation and discovery.

request.description: List all available KPI definitions in the system registry with metadata and supported aggregation types.
Run validation checks on a KPI configuration to detect issues before activation.
Get a summary view of a single KPI configuration including linked programmes and current status.
